findings.issue: Test suite is 886/886 — plan target was ≥5500. 99% per-layer coverage gate unverified (no lcov run in repo).
findings.suggested_fix: Either (a) execute Phase 14 deep-test pass to ~5500 before ship, or (b) officially lower the target in plan with D-ID and justify per layer.

findings.issue: PIN hashing is SHA-256 despite D-SEC-10 mandating Argon2id. D-SEC-10 is RESOLVED and enforceable — this is a security regression against a live decision.
findings.suggested_fix: Replace hashPin() in pin_entry_dialog.dart with pointycastle Argon2id (m=65536, t=3, p=4) per D-SEC-10 before ship.

findings.issue: 10 D-IDs claimed in WAL decisions_added never appear in decisions-log.md: D-STRATEGY-1, D-STRATEGY-2, D-SERVICE-1, D-SERVICE-2, D-SERVICE-3, D-SERVICE-4, D-UI-1, D-BACKUP-1, D-TELEMETRY-1, D-PLATFORM-12. Plan requires every design discussion to land a D-ID.
findings.suggested_fix: Back-fill the 10 missing D-IDs in decisions-log.md with their resolved rationale, or renumber to existing D-SERVICES-* where semantics overlap.

findings.issue: Phase 16 manual device matrix (items 10-17 of checklist) NEVER executed — plan marks these as ship gate.
findings.suggested_fix: Run device matrix on physical Android (Pixel+Samsung) + iOS 17+ device before any release build is promoted.

findings.issue: No phase-00.json or phase-16.json WAL files exist; plan §PM orchestration contract required one per phase.
findings.suggested_fix: Create both WAL files retroactively from commit log to preserve the checkpoint chain.

findings.issue: ZERO golden tests in the repo. Plan Phase 12 required a golden per widget + stealth goldens × 14 locales (TEST-096, TEST-114).
findings.suggested_fix: Author golden suite before ship; stealth no-English-leak golden per RTL locale minimum.

findings.issue: ZERO accessibility-semantics assertions in test tree; plan required Semantics on non-text interactive widgets + TalkBack/VoiceOver manual verification.
findings.suggested_fix: Add Semantics test pass; run accessibility-tester review per plan Phase 12 roster.

findings.issue: DistressConfirmation and ImSafeSlider widgets are defined but never instantiated in any feature screen — they are dead code.
findings.suggested_fix: Wire DistressConfirmation into PIN distress flow and ImSafeSlider into session disarm flow before ship.

findings.issue: Backup service uses PBKDF2→AES-CTR+HMAC-SHA256 (hand-rolled), not AES-256-GCM. The construction is sound but homemade crypto in a safety app is risky.
findings.suggested_fix: Migrate to package:cryptography AES-256-GCM (v1.1 in TODO) before ship, or formally accept the construction in a new D-ID with audit trail.

findings.issue: Reviewer roster per plan §Reviewer-roster-summary was NEVER invoked — no Block/Warn/Note arrays, no docs/rewrite-debt.md. The PM explicitly skipped design-review loops (per verification-agent brief).
findings.suggested_fix: Acknowledged: verification-agent run IS the review loop. Record this as a D-ID deviation with justification (time budget), and treat the Block findings in this report as the canonical review output.

findings.issue: Phase 4 used 3 parallel sub-agents (a/b/c, 134 files) despite plan matrix flagging Phase 4 as 'seq; skeleton pass'. Parallel was allowed only for design-discussion-read-only agents per plan.
findings.suggested_fix: Acknowledge deviation in decisions-log (D-PROCESS-3) with outcome: no observed L5 collision so deviation was safe. Retroactive rationale suffices.

findings.issue: No Robolectric or XCTest unit tests added in Phase 10; plan required both (SmsWorkerTest.kt, CallStatePluginTests.swift, etc.) with device-smoke green as exit.
findings.suggested_fix: Add native test suites before shipping release builds OR explicitly scope out with a D-ID deviation.

findings.issue: Release-pipeline secrets (ANDROID_KEYSTORE_*, APPLE_*, SENTRY_*) are stubbed; release CI step is placeholder.
findings.suggested_fix: Product-owner action; confirm secrets are injected at CI level before first tagged release.

findings.issue: TaskUpdate journal alignment — we do not have persistence of the TaskCreate/TaskUpdate tree in this conversation; plan required the journal as 'only cross-session truth'. Commit log + WAL files are aligned (17 phases → 16 commits + 15 WAL files), but the TaskUpdate record cannot be audited from here.
findings.suggested_fix: Confirm the TaskUpdate tree was maintained; if not, treat WAL+commits as sole source and document this in a D-PROCESS-X note.

findings.issue: Phase 3 delivered 21 model files (plan said 19). Phase 4 delivered 31 screens (plan said 26). Delta is natural refinement but should be noted.
findings.suggested_fix: No action; document in decisions-log as 'plan count updated to actual' in a single D-ID.

findings.issue: FakeCallConfig.fromJson null→'Mom' coercion bug flagged in phase-14 but never ticketed with a D-ID. Regression test locks current behavior.
findings.suggested_fix: Either (a) fix the coercion and update the regression test, or (b) log the intentional behavior as a D-ID before ship.

open_questions: Should the 886-vs-5500 test gap block ship, or is the 99% coverage on correctness-critical paths (engine, orchestration, data layer) sufficient? Plan explicitly said ~5500 required.
Is the PM-self-review (no external reviewer agents invoked) acceptable given 'correctness is the only success criterion' clause of the plan? If not, the entire rewrite needs a reviewer pass.
Should SHA-256 PIN hashing ship as-is? D-SEC-10 mandates Argon2id — this is RESOLVED, not deferred.
Do we wait for real-device matrix (Phase 16 items 10-17) before tagging a release?
Should the 10 missing D-IDs be back-filled into decisions-log, or should the WAL entries be corrected to reference existing decisions?
